scope_note: QA-KG Source Claims Cert [253] v1: Phase 3 SourceClaim / SourceWork / contradicts ingestion invariants. Primary source: docs/specs/QA_MEM_SCOPE.md (Dale, 2026); tools/qa_kg/extractors/source_claims.py (Dale, 2026); tools/qa_kg/fixtures/source_claims_phase3.json (Dale, 2026); docs/theory/svp_wiki_qa_elements_snapshot.md (Pond, 1998). The single source of truth for closed sets is closed_sets.json in this directory (reasons + contradicts_endpoints). Gates: (SC1) every SourceClaim has non-empty quote (body) AND source_locator that resolves via tools.qa_kg.locators; (SC2) every SourceClaim has exactly one quoted-from edge to an existing SourceWork node (epistemic_status=source_work); (SC3) extraction_method on every SourceClaim is in {manual, ocr, llm, script}; (SC4) no two SourceClaims with identical source_locator AND different body without a contradicts edge between them; (SC5) every contradicts edge carries provenance JSON with a reason in the closed set {ocr, variant, typo, dispute, true}; (SC6) no contradicts cycles in the populated graph; (SC7) WARN sensor for unresolved contradicts with reason=dispute; (SC8) no contradicts edge endpoint has node_type=Axiom or authority=agent.
